items.title: Big Tech and Pharma Earnings: What to Watch This Week
items.description: Earnings season marches on this week. Two more Magnificent Seven tech companies—Alphabet and Amazon—will report, following on the heels of disappointing results from Microsoft that helped send software stocks tumbling last week.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 2: Apple Stock Jumps After Record Q1 Revenue Boosts Investor Confidence
items.description: On Feb. 2, 2026, record holiday iPhone sales, surging services, and fresh AI moves put Apple's growth story under the microscope.

items.title: I Predicted Microsoft Would Hit an All-Time High in 2025, but the Stock Is Down 22% From That Record. Can Microsoft Recover in 2026?
items.description: Microsoft fell after reporting earnings despite record results.
